name: plan-forge
description: Plan Forge — The AI-Native SDLC Forge Shop. Four stations (Smelt, Forge, Guard, Learn) covering the whole lifecycle. 104 MCP tools (core + LiveGuard + Watcher + Crucible + Tempering + Bug Registry + Testbed + Lattice + Anvil + Hallmark + Sync + Forge-Master + Auditor), 48+ CLI commands, ~21 reviewer agents, ~12 skills, live dashboard, quorum mode (auto/power/speed), audit drain loop, self-recursive intelligence, OpenBrain memory integration, cost tracking. Supports 9 presets (dotnet, typescript, python, java, go, swift, rust, php, azure-iac).
author: srnichols
